testcase.name: test_get_returns_payload_extras_field
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_whatsapp_payload_extras.py:87: in test_get_returns_payload_extras_field assert cfg["payload_extras"] is None E AssertionError: assert {'customSenderField': 'abc123', 'testCheck': True} is None

testcase.name: test_put_null_clears
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_whatsapp_payload_extras.py:111: in test_put_null_clears assert cfg["payload_extras"] is None E AssertionError: assert {'x': 1} is None

testcase.name: test_extras_cleared_removes_merge

failure.message: AssertionError: extras leaked after clear: {'to': '918826471808', 'countryCode': '+91', 'phoneNumber': '8826471808', 'from': '261186630417690', 'senderMobile': '261186630417690', 'senderMobileNumber': '261186630417690', 'senderNumber': '261186630417690', 'wabaId': '125892728400090', 'headerType': 'NONE', 'type': 'Template', 'template': {'name': 'hrmis_status_update', 'languageCode': 'en', 'language': {'code': 'en'}, 'headerType': 'NONE', 'components': [{'type': 'BODY', 'bodyValues': ['Sarah Chen', 'Test Employee', 'On Break', '12 Feb 2026, 11:30 UTC'], 'parameters': [{'type': 'text', 'text': 'Sarah Chen'}, {'type': 'text', 'text': 'Test Employee'}, {'type': 'text', 'text': 'On Break'}, {'type': 'text', 'text': '12 Feb 2026, 11:30 UTC'}]}]}, 'campaignName': 'FOOBAR'} assert 'campaignName' not in {'campaignName': 'FOOBAR', 'countryCode': '+91', 'from': '261186630417690', 'headerType': 'NONE', ...}

testcase.name: test_restore_clean_state
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_whatsapp_payload_extras.py:313: in test_restore_clean_state assert cfg["payload_extras"] is None E AssertionError: assert {'campaignName': 'FNFTEST'} is None
